title: Part 2 – Entraînement 2 : questions When / How / How long
instructions: Écoutez chaque question et les trois réponses. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.

items.audioText: When does the sales team meeting start? (A) In the large conference room. (B) At two o'clock this afternoon. (C) With the regional managers.
items.explanation: "When does it start" attend une heure. (B) la donne précisément.

items.audioText: How do I access the shared drive? (A) You need to log in with your company credentials. (B) The files are in the marketing folder. (C) I saved it yesterday.
choices: You need to log in with your company credentials.
The files are in the marketing folder.
items.explanation: "How do I access" demande une procédure. (A) explique comment faire.

items.audioText: How long will the system maintenance take? (A) It was scheduled last month. (B) About two hours, from midnight to two a.m. (C) The IT team handles that.
choices: About two hours, from midnight to two a.m.
items.explanation: "How long" demande une durée. (B) la donne avec un créneau précis.

items.audioText: When will the new product be available? (A) It's a very innovative product. (B) Starting next quarter. (C) The R&D team is working on it.
choices: The R&D team is working on it.
items.explanation: "When will it be available" demande une période. (B) répond avec le prochain trimestre.

items.audioText: How many people will attend the workshop? (A) The workshop was very useful. (B) About fifteen participants. (C) It's held every month.
items.explanation: "How many people" demande un nombre. (B) en donne un approximatif.

items.audioText: When is the next performance review scheduled? (A) It takes about an hour. (B) At the end of the quarter. (C) HR manages that process.
choices: At the end of the quarter.
items.explanation: "When is it scheduled" demande une date. (B) donne la période.

items.audioText: How much does the business class upgrade cost? (A) The flight is four hours long. (B) An extra two hundred euros. (C) You can book it online.
choices: The flight is four hours long.
items.explanation: "How much does it cost" demande un prix. (B) donne le supplément en euros.

items.audioText: How often do you back up your files? (A) Every evening before I leave the office. (B) On an external hard drive. (C) The IT department set it up.
choices: Every evening before I leave the office.
The IT department set it up.
items.explanation: "How often" demande une fréquence. (A) donne "every evening", une fréquence claire.

items.audioText: When did the new branch open? (A) It's located downtown. (B) Three months ago. (C) It's the largest branch in the region.
choices: It's the largest branch in the region.
items.explanation: "When did it open" demande une date. (B) répond avec "three months ago".

items.audioText: How long does it take to renew a company vehicle registration? (A) You need the insurance documents. (B) Usually about a week. (C) The fleet manager handles renewals.
items.explanation: "How long does it take" demande une durée. (B) donne "about a week".
